stdout:
Table	Create Table
user_sessions	CREATE TABLE `user_sessions` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `sessionId` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `userId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `deviceInfo` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `ipAddress` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL,
  `location` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `browser` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `loginTime` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastActivity` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `user_sessions_user_id_idx` (`userId`),
  KEY `user_sessions_session_id_idx` (`sessionId`),
  KEY `user_sessions_expires_at_idx` (`expiresAt`),
  UNIQUE KEY `sessionId_unique` (`sessionId`(500)),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `VvJGXt6mJVC6petxtZ2P78`.`users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
